scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && pnpm run build:cjs && pnpm run build:esm && pnpm run build:package-types
scripts.build:package-types: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }, null, 2)); fs.writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'module' }, null, 2));"
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run check:ci && pnpm run build
scripts.check:ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:types && pnpm run check:formatting && pnpm run check:spelling && pnpm run test:coverage

name: x12-parser
description: Typed EDI toolkit for X12 and EDIFACT parsing, generation, mapping, and validation
author: Ezekiel Keator <20361796+tastypackets@users.noreply.github.com>
